title: AI Health Check – AI Operations & Governance Platform
description: A comprehensive full-stack AI Operations platform unifying service health monitoring, LLM-powered incident triage, model drift detection, and compliance reporting.
longDescription: Built a production-grade AI Operations platform designed to monitor and govern large-scale LLM deployments. The system provides deep visibility into service health, model drift, and cost management, while maintaining strict compliance through a human-in-the-loop governance pipeline and immutable audit logs.
achievements: Human-in-the-Loop Governance: Architected a two-tier Claude Sonnet/Haiku pipeline where AI-drafted reports require human sign-off before being finalized.
Immutable Audit Logging: Implemented a SHA-256 hash-chain audit log to record every system action, ensuring tamper-proof compliance tracking.
Safety & Security Pipeline: Developed a multi-layer defense system including PII detection, injection prevention, and SSRF-protected service registration.
Atomic Budget Enforcement: Built a concurrency-safe 'lock-and-reserve' system for $5/day budget management, eliminating race conditions in LLM calls.
features: Model Drift Detection with Quality Threshold Alerts
Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for Enterprise Governance
Tamper-proof Audit Trails using SHA-256 Hashing
Dynamic Service Registry for Model Agnostic Orchestration

title: SonicClusters — Music Clustering & Recommendation System
description: An interactive web application demonstrating unsupervised music clustering and content-based recommendation using UMAP and Spotify metadata.
achievements: Musical Mood Labeling: Developed an automated system to name clusters based on audio profiles using multi-feature analysis.
UMAP Visualization: Implemented high-performance 2D/3D scatter plots for spatial grouping of 12,000 songs.
Real-Time Inference: Built a FastAPI backend that calculates Euclidean distances on-the-fly for recommendations.

title: ResumeMatch AI
description: Developed a full-stack AI platform that matches resumes to job postings using a multi-signal NLP pipeline (spaCy, Word2Vec, SBERT).
achievements: Custom NLP Pipeline: Built a line-by-line heuristic classifier to segment unstructured job descriptions.
Semantic Expansion: Implemented a Word2Vec model trained on 88k+ job posts.
Production Engineering: Reduced database footprint by 95% for free-tier deployment.

title: Thyra Predict – Thyroid Disease Prediction System
description: Developed and deployed a supervised ML model achieving 98.37% accuracy across 1,500+ clinical test cases.
